name: Cascade and Essentially Cascade Coupling Recipes
description: Definitions of cascade and essentially cascade system coupling recipes.

elements.text: The system coupling recipe SCR is cascade if and only if CSCR contains no feedback connections.

The system coupling recipe SCR, where VSCR = (Z1, ..., Zn) for n ∈ IJS+, is 'essentially cascade' if there exists f ∈ FNS(IJS[1, n], 1TO1, ONTO, IJS[1, n]) such that if SCRf = ((Zf(1), ..., Zf(n)), CSCR), then SCRf is cascade.
